design_philosophy.core_concept: Dark mode exclusivity with electric blue energy

textures.grid: linear-gradient(to right, #1e293b 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #1e293b 1px, transparent 1px)

Button.name: IndustrialButton
Button.style: relative group w-full p-[1px] rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500/50 via-blue-500/50 to-cyan-500/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)] transition-all duration-300
Button.inner_style: relative flex items-center justify-center gap-3 bg-slate-950 hover:bg-slate-900 text-white font-medium py-4 px-6 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-xl

Card.name: InfoCard
Card.style: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-800 backdrop-blur-md rounded-2xl p-6 hover:border-cyan-500/30 transition-colors

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run `yarn add framer-motion lucide-react react-icons clsx tailwind-merge` first.
2. SETUP: Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the custom colors and animations defined in this JSON. Specifically add the 'shine' keyframe.
3. FONTS: Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in `index.css`.
4. STRUCTURE: Create a `Layout.js` that handles the max-width and background texture.
5. COMPONENT - HERO: Build the Hero with the logo and animated background lines. The lines should move slowly to create a 'living' industrial feel.
6. COMPONENT - BUTTONS: Create the `IndustrialButton` component. It must have the gradient border effect. Use a wrapper div with the gradient padding, and an inner div for the dark background.
7. COMPONENT - DIFFERENTIAL: Use a grid layout for the 'Qualidade', 'Agilidade' etc. items. Use icons for each.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the black background. Use `text-slate-200` for body text, not `text-gray-500`.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all buttons and links.

do_not_use: gradients on text unless large heading
